ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employee_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date when the log was recorded */,
  "log_time" TEXT /* Time when the log was recorded */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the employee */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, logout, file access) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the activity was performed */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_logs_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "vin" TEXT /* Vehicle Identification Number (VIN) associated with the employee */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the employee is based in */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the area or region the employee belongs to */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary of the employee */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the employee */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the employee belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Job position of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was terminated (if applicable) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current employment status (e.g., active, terminated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the country */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language of the country */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* ISO currency code of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "areas" (
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each area */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the area */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the area belongs to */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the area (if different from the country) */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language of the area (if different from the country) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salaries" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "amount" REAL /* Salary amount */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the salary */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date from which the salary is effective */,
  "payment_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of salary payments (e.g., monthly, bi-weekly) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the salary record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salaries_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_logs" (
  "security_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security log entry */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date when the security event occurred */,
  "log_time" TEXT /* Time when the security event occurred */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of security event (e.g., login, logout, anomaly) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the event occurred */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the event */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity of the security event (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("security_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_logs_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
